checks.summary: Dispatcher template exists in the repo and is self-contained.
Template explicitly supports 20 tasks over a 6-slot pool in four waves.
Template records model, slot, status, result, risks, and next step.
Template contains practical run instructions, wave rotation, and slot reuse guidance.
Fresh verification artifacts were written under the task artifact directory.

notes: Repository was already dirty before this task; verification scoped conclusions to newly added dispatcher files.
